login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to save recommendations and access your dashboard.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join NexusAI-DB to save recommendations and track history.
register.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

modal.headline: Build Smarter with AI Agents.
modal.subhead: Access 525+ models, create custom agents, and automate your workflow — all in one platform.

features.f2: Custom agent builder with any model

modal.welcomeBackSub: Sign in to your NexusAI account to continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.profileBlurb: This simplified dashboard shows your authenticated session using the login, signup, and session APIs.

recommend.title: Click the box and type anything
recommend.subtitle: You don't need the right keywords. Just describe what you'd like to do — we'll take it from there.
recommend.placeholder: Click here and type anything — or just say "help me choose an AI model for…"
recommend.errorMin: Describe your use case (at least 4 characters).

chatLauncher.title: Guided Discovery Chat
chatLauncher.subtitle: Tell us what you're trying to do — we'll help you find the right models.
chatLauncher.welcomeBot: Hi! I'm your guided discovery chat. Tell me what you want to build and I'll suggest which models to explore.
chatLauncher.replyBot: Great! I don't run a live AI model here yet, but based on your message I'll highlight suitable models in the recommendation panel above. Try also using the big input on the page to get a ranked top 3.
chatLauncher.placeholder: Describe your use case in plain language…
suggestions: Help me choose a coding model
I want to generate product images
Recommend a model for long documents

agents.title: Agent Builder
agents.subtitle: Create powerful AI agents using any model. Pick a template or start from scratch.
agents.canvasText: Chat with our AI guide — describe what you want your agent to do and get a personalised setup plan.

research.title: Research Agent
research.description: Automates web research, summarises findings, and generates structured reports on demand.

support.title: Customer Support Agent
support.description: Handles tickets, FAQs, and escalates complex issues with a full conversation context.

review.title: Code Review Agent
review.description: Reviews pull requests, flags bugs, suggests improvements, and explains changes inline.

analysis.title: Data Analysis Agent
analysis.description: Processes spreadsheets, generates insights, creates visualisations, and answers data questions.

content.title: Content Writer Agent
content.description: Creates blog posts, social content, and marketing copy tuned to your brand voice.

agents.gateText: Create an account or sign in to build agents and manage tasks. Use the sign-in window to continue.
agents.libraryEmptyMine: No custom agents yet. Create one with + New Agent.
agents.agentLibrarySub: Choose a default agent or build your own
agents.tasksEmpty: No tasks yet. Click "New Task" to add one.
agents.tasksEmptyForAgent: No tasks for this agent yet.
agents.tasksHintNewOnDefault: New tasks are always added to your default agent.

workbench.headline: Agent works
workbench.sub: Your AI agent takes care of everything, end to end.
workbench.placeholder: What should we work on next?
workbench.placeholderHome: Click here and type anything — or just say hi! 🙋‍♀️
workbench.toolbarAria: Quick filters — loads matching suggestions from the server
workbench.homeSectionSub: Search across use cases — suggestions update as you type.

modal.subtitle: Pre-built template · Ready to deploy in minutes
modal.bannerBody: This template is optimised for your selected workflow. Adjust the purpose and prompts, then save.
modal.stepNameQuestion: What do you want to call your agent?
modal.placeholderName: e.g. Support Bot, Research Assistant, Code Reviewer…
modal.deployIntro: Get a shareable endpoint or embed widget. Monitor performance in the NexusAI dashboard — track response quality, latency, token usage, and satisfaction scores.
modal.deployCard1Desc: Get a REST endpoint. Integrate into any app, website, or backend in minutes.
modal.deployCard2Desc: Drop a chat widget onto your website with one line of JavaScript.
modal.deployCard3Desc: Deploy as a Slack bot — your team can chat with the agent directly.
modal.deployCard4Desc: Connect via Twilio to deploy your agent on WhatsApp or SMS.
modal.toolsIntro: Connect the tools your agent needs — APIs, webhooks, databases, and data sources. You can refine these after save.
modal.memoryIntro: Configure short-term conversation history and long-term vector memory so your agent keeps the right context.
modal.testIntro: Run scenarios in the Agent Playground, tune prompts from failures, then ship with confidence.
modal.toolsPlaceholder: Choose integrations after save — webhooks, search, databases, and more.
modal.memoryPlaceholder: Short-term and long-term memory can be configured in the dashboard after deployment.
modal.testPlaceholder: Run test scenarios in the Agent Playground after your agent is saved.
modal.step1Help: This template is pre-configured as shown below. You can customise the purpose or proceed with the default.
modal.placeholderPurpose: Describe what this agent should accomplish…
modal.placeholderSystem: You are a helpful assistant that…
modal.stepLaterPlaceholder: Configure this step in the full agent builder after saving.
modal.errorName: Enter a name for your agent (at least 2 characters).
modal.errorPurpose: Describe what this agent should accomplish (at least 4 characters).
modal.errorSystem: Write a system prompt for your agent (at least 8 characters).
modal.errorSaveGeneric: Could not save your agent. Please try again.

1.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro achieves new SOTA on reasoning benchmarks
1.summary: Scores 82.3% on AIME 2025 math competition, outperforming all prior models on reasoning‑intensive tasks.

2.title: Scaling laws for multimodal models: new empirical findings
2.summary: Research reveals unexpected scaling dynamics when combining vision and language — efficiency gains plateau earlier than expected.

3.title: Constitutional AI v2: improved alignment through iterative refinement
3.summary: New methodology achieves 40% reduction in harmful outputs while preserving capability on standard benchmarks.

4.title: Llama 4 Scout & Maverick: natively multimodal from the ground up
4.summary: 17B MoE architecture trained on 40 trillion tokens with native understanding across text, images, and audio.

5.title: Long‑context recall: how models handle 1M+ token windows
5.summary: Comprehensive evaluation shows sharp recall degradation beyond 200K tokens for most frontier models.

6.title: DeepSeek‑R1 open weights: reproducing frontier reasoning at minimal cost
6.summary: Full weight release enables fine‑tuning for domain‑specific reasoning at a fraction of frontier model prices.

marketplace.subtitle: Search and compare frontier models across labs, pricing tiers, and capabilities.
marketplace.helpText: Chat with our AI guide for a personalised model recommendation in under 60 seconds.
marketplace.emptyHint: Try a different search term or filter.
marketplace.emptyDbHint: The catalogue is empty. From the backend folder run `npm run seed` with MongoDB running.

gpt5.description: OpenAI flagship: native compute-aware agents, advanced reasoning, 2M context.

gpt52.description: Mid-tier GPT-5 variant with improved instruction-following and multimodal support.

gpt5turbo.description: Most cost-effective GPT-5 for high-volume workloads and background automation.

gpt45.description: Bridging model with improved creativity and long-form generation capabilities.

gpt41mini.description: Lightweight GPT-4.1 tier, ideal for everyday tasks and high-volume chat workloads.

gpt4o.description: OpenAI's flagship GPT-4o for lightweight chat, realtime tools, and streaming responses.

o3.description: OpenAI's advanced reasoning model with chain-of-thought for complex tasks and analysis.

claude-opus.description: Anthropic's most capable model for complex analysis, research, and nuanced writing tasks.

claude-sonnet.description: The ideal balance of speed and intelligence for high-throughput tasks and agentic workflows.

gemini-pro.description: Google's flagship multimodal model with native video, image, and 2M context window.

gemini-flash.description: Ultra-fast Gemini model for real-time applications, agents, and high-frequency tasks.

llama4.description: Meta's open-source multimodal model with MoE architecture and 10M context window.

chatHub.welcomeTitle: Welcome! I'm here to help you 👋
chatHub.welcomeSubBefore: No tech background needed. Tell me what you'd like to
chatHub.welcomeSubAfter: — I'll help you discover what's possible, step by step.
chatHub.actionLabel: WHAT WOULD YOU LIKE TO DO TODAY?
chatHub.actionHint: Or type anything below — there are no wrong answers ↓
chatHub.inputPlaceholder: Describe your project, ask a question, or just say hi — I'm here to help...

bot.matches: Great question! I found {{count}} strong matches: {{names}}. The top pick is {{top}} with a {{score}}% match score. Click any model in the sidebar to learn more!
bot.noMatches: I couldn't find strong matches for that query. Try mentioning what you want to create — like "generate images", "write code", "transcribe audio", or "translate content".
bot.noModelsLoaded: Tell me more about your project and I'll recommend the best AI models for your needs!

home.heroSub: You don't need to know anything about AI. Answer a few simple questions and we'll help you discover, compare, and deploy the right model for your use case.
home.flagshipNote: * Prices shown are approximate. Free self-hosted models exclude infrastructure costs. Beta pricing may change.
home.newsletterTitle:
New models drop every week.
Don't miss a release.
home.newsletterText: Get a curated weekly digest: new model releases, benchmark comparisons, pricing changes, and prompt tips — straight to your inbox.
home.footerMeta: New models, benchmark comparisons, pricing changes, and prompt tips.

guided-chat.title: Guided Discovery Chat
guided-chat.description: Have a natural conversation about your goals and get model recommendations without touching a dropdown.

prompt-guide.title: Prompt Engineering Guide
prompt-guide.description: Tailored prompt templates and principles for every model so your first request already feels pro-level.

agent-builder.title: Agent Builder
agent-builder.description: Step-by-step blueprints for creating production-ready AI agents — tools, memory, and deployment.

flex-pricing.title: Flexible Pricing
flex-pricing.description: From free-tier to enterprise — compare cost per 1M tokens and pick the right fit for your budget.

reviews.title: User Reviews & Ratings
reviews.description: Real feedback, benchmark scores, and I/O specs to help you choose with confidence.

research-feed.title: Research Feed
research-feed.description: Stay ahead with curated daily updates on new models, pricing changes, and breakthrough papers.

free.label: Free & Open Source
free.summary: Llama 4 Maverick, DeepSeek-V3, DeepSeek-R1 — self-host with zero API cost.

budget.label: Budget — Under $0.50/1M
budget.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, Mistral Medium, Nemotron Nano — best performance per dollar.

mid.label: Mid-Range — $1–$5/1M
mid.summary: Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.4, Qwen3-Max — balanced price and capability.

premium.label: Premium — $5+/1M
premium.summary: Claude Opus 4.6, Sora 2 Pro, gpt-image-1.5 — top-tier quality for demanding workloads.

claude-opus-46.description: 1M token context and adaptive thinking for complex reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows.

gemini-31-pro.description: 5M context with Thought Signatures for transparent deep reasoning and document analysis.

gpt-54.description: Built-in computer-use agents for autonomous browser, app, and file workflows.

trend-claude.title: Claude Opus 4.6 & Sonnet 4.6
trend-claude.description: Adaptive Thinking and 1M token context (beta) mark a major leap in agent capability.

trend-gemini.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro — Thought Signatures
trend-gemini.description: Thought Signatures add transparency to deep reasoning with a 5M token context window.

trend-gpt54.title: GPT-5.4 — Native Computer-Use Agents
trend-gpt54.description: Operate browsers, apps, and files autonomously with improved reasoning efficiency.
